calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Feb-01-2011 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for OSC hearing for Change of Name of A ADULT.
Dept. 514, JUDGE ELLEN CHAITIN, Clerk: J. WILLIS-MCGHEE, CSR: K. Held, #2857.

Petitioner SARAH BROOKE KENNON was present in pro per.
Petitioner was placed under oath and examined.
Proof of Publication in the file.

No objections to the proposed change of name were made at the hearing.
It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct and sufficient, and that the petition should be granted.

The Court grants the petition for Change of Name of the ADULT TO SARAH BROOKE BROOKS.

Decree Changing Names was submitted to and signed by the Court.
